name: comment-thread-01
title: Comment Thread 01
author: ilinxa
description: Recursive comment tree with composer + realtime. Composes expandable-text-01 (long bodies) + engagement-bar-01 compact (per-row like). Inline-expand past maxDepth, optimistic add/like/delete, autosize composer with Enter-submit / Shift+Enter newline / Escape cancel keyboard ergonomics, Subscribe<CommentDelta> realtime contract, kebab with own-only Delete + Report defaults (commentActions slot for full takeover), renderNode / renderViewReplies / renderComposer slots, imperative reset() / dispatch() escape hatches for external state sync. No framer-motion, no react-textarea-autosize peer dep, no date-fns peer dep. Fifth ship in the social-posts-system arc.
